description:
A screenshot of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) CLC+ Core Data Catalogue web interface, displaying a list of data ingestions and an "Uploading error" modal dialog. The top navigation bar shows "Data Catalogue", "EAGLE Ontology", "About EAGLE", "Organisations", and "Users". The main view is titled "Data Catalogue" and includes filters for "My organisation/s", "My data", "Ingestions", and "Extractions", along with a search bar and an "ADD INGESTION" button.

The main area lists several data ingestions with the following columns: "EAGLE Approved", "Name", "Type" (represented by a document icon), "Created At", "Created By", "Country", "Region", "Reference Year", "Time Range", "Organisation/s", "Contact Person", and "Status".

Visible rows in the data table include:
*   "HRL - Water and Wetnes..." created "06.09.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European Environ..." in "2018", time range "01.01.2012 - 31.12.2018", organisation "CLC, European Env...", contact "info@eea.europa.eu", status "USED".
*   "N2K 2018" created "21.06.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European Environ..." in "2018", time range "15.05.2017 - 14.09.2019", organisation "CLC, European Env...", contact "copernicus@eea.e...", status "USED".
*   "Riparian Zones (RZ) 2018" created "21.06.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European Environ..." in "2018", time range "01.03.2018 - 31.07.2018", organisation "CLC, European Env...", contact "copernicus@eea.e...", status "USED".
*   "Riparian Zones (RZ) 2018" created "21.02.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European E[unreadable]", status "USED".
*   "Urban Atlas (UA) 2018" created "20.06.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European B[unreadable]", contact "Matteo.Mattiuzzi@...", status "USED".
*   "Urban Atlas (UA) 2018" created "20.02.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European E[unreadable]", contact "copernicus@eea.e...", status "USED".
*   "Urban_Atlas_IBK_2018" created "21.11.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "Austria/Öst[unreadable]", with a status of "UPLOADING_ERROR" indicated by a warning icon.
*   "Coastal Zones (CZ) 2012" created "21.06.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European E[unreadable]", contact "info@eea.europa.eu", status "PUBLISHED".
*   "Corine Land Cover (CLC)..." created "14.06.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European E[unreadable]", contact "copernicus@eea.e...", status "PUBLISHED".
*   "HRL - Grassland 2018" created "10.03.2023" by "CLC+ Core User Admin..." for "European B[unreadable]", contact "copernicus@eea.e...", status "PUBLISHED".

An "Uploading error for ingestion: Urban_Atlas_IBK_2018" modal dialog is superimposed, stating: "The upload failed because the url directed to a file which is not supported for ingestion. It needs to contain a file of the type: tif, TIF, TIFF, tiff, ZIP, h5, gpkg. If the url opens a download page, please enter the download link you find there as the source for the upload. Contact admins and provide the error id: 84a7a295-53b7-42b1-87ba-b70d167c11f1. Please use the action 'Retry' for making the needed changes or for retrying to add the Ingestion. Otherwise, please delete the Ingestion." The dialog offers four buttons: "CLOSE", "DELETE", "RETRY", and "RETRY MERGE". The table footer indicates "Items per page: 10".
